content.content: Take a moment to reflect on your day. Write freely and honestly.
Browse through your past journal entries.

seedData.title: A Fresh Start
seedData.entry: Today I decided to start journaling regularly. I feel hopeful about building this new habit and reflecting on my days more intentionally.

seedData.title: Rainy Afternoon Thoughts
seedData.entry: Spent the afternoon reading while it rained outside. There is something peaceful about the sound of rain against the window. Finished two chapters of my book.

help.overview: Personal Journal is your private space to write daily reflections. Capture your thoughts, track your mood, and look back on past entries anytime.

pages.writeEntryPage: Give your entry a title, pick the date, select your current mood from the dropdown, and write your journal text. Press Save Entry when finished, or Discard to go back without saving.
pages.viewEntriesPage: This page lists all your saved journal entries with their dates, titles, moods, and content.

tour.title: Welcome to Your Journal
tour.content: Journaling helps reduce stress, improve self-awareness, and track personal growth. This app keeps your entries private and stored locally on your device.

tour.title: Write an Entry
tour.content: Give each entry a title, pick the date, choose your mood from the dropdown, and write whatever is on your mind. Fields marked with * are required.

tour.title: Review Past Entries
tour.content: Browse your previous entries to notice patterns in your mood and reflect on how you have grown over time.
